description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a modern industrial aesthetic, featuring a brick exterior and large rectangular windows on the front facade. The ground floor includes a black garage door and a main entryway, both framed by industrial-style lighting fixtures. A wooden privacy fence encloses a side yard with tropical palm trees and an outdoor staircase leading to a second-floor deck. The rear and side walls are mostly unadorned brick, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The flat roof and open upper floor suggest a contemporary loft-like interior layout, while the sidewalk and driveway integrate the house into a typical city street setting.
description: A modern two-story brick house with large front windows, a garage, and a fenced side yard with palm trees and an outdoor staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brick facade, large windows, garage door, main entry, and part of the fenced yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain brick wall with no windows or doors, and the sidewalk extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the unadorned brick wall, a small window, and the wooden fence enclosing the side yard.
description_view_3: Angled view of the fenced side yard, outdoor staircase, palm trees, and partial view of the upper deck and windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, steps, industrial lighting, and adjacent garage door; no porch or overhang.
